error.account.status.not_found: Account status not found for account: {id}
error.account.status.activation.validity: Account {id} cannot be activated: no validity period start date is defined.
Account {id} cannot be activated: the validity period starts on {start}, which is a future date.
error.account.status.activation.before_v: Account {id} cannot be activated: the activation date ({activationAt}) is before the validity period start ({start}).
error.account.status.activation.in_futur: Account {id} cannot be activated: the activation date ({activationAt}) is a future date.
error.account.status.activation_at_read_: Account {id} status cannot set activationAt: this field is managed by the activation endpoint.
error.account.status.validity_period_inv: Account {id} status cannot be updated: validity period start ({start}) must be before or equal to end ({end}).
error.account.status.suspension_period_i: Account {id} status cannot be updated: suspension period start ({start}) must be before or equal to end ({end}).
error.account.status.validity_start_froz: Account {id} status cannot be updated: the existing validity period start ({current}) is in the past and cannot be modified.
error.account.status.validity_start_in_p: Account {id} status cannot be updated: the new validity period start ({start}) must be greater than or equal to today.
error.account.status.validity_end_in_pas: Account {id} status cannot be updated: the validity period end ({end}) must be greater than or equal to today.
error.account.status.suspension_start_be: Account {id} status cannot be updated: the suspension period start ({suspensionStart}) must be greater than or equal to the validity period start ({validityStart}).
error.account.status.suspension_start_in: Account {id} status cannot be updated: the suspension period start ({start}) must be greater than or equal to today.
error.account.status.suspension_outside_: Account {id} status cannot be updated: the suspension period must be within the validity period (validity end: {validityEnd}).
error.account.status.validity_period_sta: Account {id} status cannot be updated: validity period start date is required.
error.account.creation.validity_period_s: Account for {email} cannot be created: validity period start date is required.
Account for {email} cannot be created: the validity period start date ({start}) must be greater than or equal to today.
error.organizational.unit.root: The organizational unit name/type 'root' is reserved for system use.
error.organizational.unit.root.delete: The 'root' organizational unit cannot be deleted.
error.organizational.unit.root.update: The 'root' organizational unit cannot be updated.
error.organizational.unit.already_exists: Organizational unit already exists for name '{name}' and type '{type}'
error.organizational.unit.status.not_fou: Organizational unit status not found for organizational unit: {id}
error.organizational.unit.status.suspens: Organizational unit {id} status cannot be updated: suspension period start ({start}) must be before or equal to end ({end}).
Organizational unit {id} status cannot be updated: the suspension period start ({start}) must be greater than or equal to today.
Organizational unit {id} status cannot be updated: the suspension period end ({end}) must be greater than or equal to today.
error.account.status.suspension_end_in_p: Account {id} status cannot be updated: the suspension period end ({end}) must be greater than or equal to today.
error.account.status.deactivation_in_pas: Account {id} status cannot be updated: the deactivation date ({end}) must be greater than or equal to today.
error.account.status.deactivation_before: Account {id} status cannot be updated: the deactivation date ({end}) must be greater than or equal to the validity start ({start}).
error.organizational.unit.status.not_sus: Organizational unit {id} cannot be reactivated: it is not currently suspended.
error.account.status.validity_start_not_: Account {id} validity cannot be updated: the validity start ({start}) must be in the future.
error.account.status.validity_start_afte: Account {id} validity cannot be updated: the validity start ({start}) must be before the validity end ({end}).
error.account.status.validity_start_lock: Account {id} validity cannot be updated: the validity start cannot be changed once the account has been activated.
error.account.status.nothing_to_reactiva: Account {id} cannot be reactivated: it is neither currently suspended nor deactivated.
